title: DeHub vs DePaul DeHUB vs Rowan DEHub: Which One Are You Looking For?
html:
Type "dehub" into a search box and you get three completely different results. If you want the decentralised social network for creators, you want DeHub at dehub.io, a UK Web3 platform built by DeLabs Ltd. If you are a DePaul University student you want DeHUB, the student engagement portal at dehub.depaul.edu. And if you are an engineer you might want Rowan University's DEHub, a digital engineering research hub. Same spelling, three separate organisations, no connection between them.

This page exists to clear that up in one read. We will explain what each one is, why the name collides, and how to tell in two seconds which one you actually need.

The short answer: dehub not depaul, and not Rowan either

Here is the fast version if you are in a hurry.

  • DeHub (dehub.io) is a decentralised, user-owned social media platform and Web3 creator economy. This is the one most people searching "dehub crypto", "dehub app" or "DHB token" are after. It is us.
  • DePaul DeHUB (dehub.depaul.edu) is a student engagement and involvement portal run by DePaul University in Chicago. Nothing to do with crypto.
  • Rowan DEHub is the Digital Engineering Hub at Rowan University in New Jersey, an academic research initiative.

If your question is "is dehub the student portal?", the answer is no when you mean the platform at dehub.io. The dehub university tools live on their respective university domains and are entirely separate from the social network. So the "dehub crypto vs dehub depaul" question is really a question about two organisations that happen to share a name.

DeHub the decentralised social network (dehub.io) — this is us

DeHub is an open-source, censorship-resistant social network where creators own their content and their audience. It was founded as a project in 2021, and the UK company behind it, DeLabs Ltd, was incorporated in 2022. The co-founders are Mike Hales and Indi Jay Cammish, who also built First Class Agency, the UK's number-one official TikTok LIVE partner agency with more than 1,200 live streamers. DeHub also sponsors the North Wales Crusaders rugby league club.

What makes it a genuine alternative rather than another feed:

  • On-chain ownership. Your content is minted on-chain the moment you upload, so you hold it, not a platform.
  • A transparent, chronological feed. No opaque ranking algorithm deciding who sees you.
  • Real creator monetisation. Tokenised uploads that can be free, pay-per-view or token-gated; on-chain tradable subscriptions that carry resale royalties back to the creator; watch-to-earn bounties; and up to 90% ad-revenue share to the ecosystem.
  • Live and play. Livepeer-powered live streaming that has scaled past 50,000 concurrent viewers, on-chain live streams with animated tips, a play-to-earn arcade, and the flagship MMA battle-royale game Last Chad Standing.
  • Privacy and infrastructure. Open-source end-to-end encrypted messaging, a custom CDN with sub-200ms global latency, and DePIN infrastructure underneath.

The ecosystem token is $DHB, primarily on Base (an Ethereum Layer 2), with contracts also on BNB Chain and Polygon. It trades on DEXs and on Coinbase, and is listed on CoinGecko and CoinMarketCap.

If that is what you were looking for, start with DeHub, the decentralised social network, or jump straight into the DeHub app. New to the token? Read how to buy the DHB token in the UK. Curious about the earning side? Here is what DeHub watch-to-earn actually is.

DePaul University DeHUB (dehub.depaul.edu)

DePaul University, a private university in Chicago, runs a student engagement platform branded DeHUB at dehub.depaul.edu. It is the sort of portal universities use for student organisations, campus events, involvement records and community life. If you are a DePaul student, staff member or applicant, that is the site you want, and you will typically reach it by logging in with your university credentials.

To be clear: DePaul's DeHUB is a legitimate, well-established university service. It simply has nothing to do with the DeHub social network or the $DHB token. There is no shared ownership, no shared login, and no crypto component. If you landed here trying to check a campus event or a student org, head to your university's site directly.

Rowan University DEHub (digital engineering)

Rowan University in New Jersey uses the name DEHub for its Digital Engineering Hub, an academic and research initiative focused on digital engineering, modelling and systems work. It is aimed at engineering students, faculty and industry partners, and it lives on Rowan's own university web presence.

Again, respectfully and plainly: Rowan's DEHub is a serious academic programme, and it is unrelated to both the DeHub social network and DePaul's portal. Three organisations, one unfortunate spelling overlap.

How to tell which dehub you need in two seconds

You can usually settle the "dehub university or dehub crypto" question by looking at three things.

  • Check the domain. dehub.io is the Web3 social network. A dehub.depaul.edu or a rowan.edu address is a university. The domain is the single most reliable signal.
  • Check your intent. If your search included words like crypto, token, DHB, wallet, watch-to-earn, creator or app, you want dehub.io. If it involved a campus, a course, a student login or an engineering programme, you want a university.
  • Check for a login wall. The university portals gate most content behind institutional sign-in. DeHub's social platform is open to browse and to join with a wallet, no student ID required.

So when someone asks "is DeHub the student portal?" the honest answer is: only if you specifically mean DePaul's or Rowan's. The platform at dehub.io is an independent UK company, not a university system.

Want the full side-by-side reasoning and the entity signals search engines use? We keep a dedicated explainer on what DeHub the decentralised social network is and how it fits the wider decentralised world DeHub operates in.

Frequently asked questions

Is DeHub the same as DePaul's DeHUB?

No. DeHub at dehub.io is a decentralised social network operated by DeLabs Ltd, a UK company. DePaul's DeHUB at dehub.depaul.edu is a student engagement portal run by DePaul University in Chicago. They share only a name.

Is DeHub a university or student portal?

The platform at dehub.io is not a university or a student portal. It is a Web3 social media and creator-economy platform. The student and engineering "dehub" tools you may be thinking of belong to DePaul University and Rowan University respectively.

What is the difference between DeHub crypto and DeHub DePaul?

DeHub crypto refers to the dehub.io social network and its $DHB ecosystem token on Base, BNB Chain and Polygon. DeHub DePaul refers to a university student portal with no token and no crypto involvement. Different organisations, different purposes.

Who owns the DeHub social network?

DeHub is built by DeLabs Ltd, a United Kingdom company incorporated in 2022, with the project founded in 2021. Its co-founders, Mike Hales and Indi Jay Cammish, also founded First Class Agency, the UK's leading official TikTok LIVE partner agency.

Where do I sign up for the DeHub social network?

Visit the DeHub web app or download it from Google Play. You join with a crypto wallet, no university credentials needed.
